description: Eval cases for injection vulnerabilities: SQL injection, XSS, command injection, LDAP injection, NoSQL injection

cases.name: Python f-string SQL injection
cases.description: SQL query built with f-string interpolation

cases.name: Node.js template literal SQL injection
cases.description: SQL query built with template literal

cases.name: React dangerouslySetInnerHTML XSS
Python subprocess shell injection
cases.description: Subprocess call with shell=True and user input
cases.code_snippet:
import subprocess
filename = request.args.get('file')
subprocess.call(f'cat /var/logs/{filename}', shell=True)

cases.name: MongoDB injection via unvalidated object
DOM XSS via innerHTML
LDAP filter injection
cases.description: LDAP filter with unescaped user input
cases.code_snippet:
def authenticate(username, password):
    filter = f"(&(uid={username})(password={password}))"
    result = ldap_conn.search_s(base_dn, ldap.SCOPE_SUBTREE, filter)
    return len(result) > 0

cases.name: Safe parameterized SQL query
cases.description: Correctly parameterized query should not be flagged
